caption: The video appears to be a segment from a medical educational session, specifically from the University of Maryland School of Medicine Surgical Bootcamp for the Class of 2023. The scene is set in a clinical environment, likely a hospital room or training facility, with several individuals seated in a semi-circle. The participants include medical candidates and possibly instructors or mentors, all wearing masks, suggesting adherence to health protocols. The text on the left side of the screen lists the names of the MD candidates involved, along with acknowledgments for administrative support and special thanks to the class for participating in the filming. The atmosphere seems focused and professional, indicative of a learning or discussion session aimed at preparing future surgeons. A QR code is also visible, likely providing additional information or resources related to the bootcamp.
